content.en:
It's been a long time since a bone transformation realm has been born in the Chaos Cave.

Of course, if they really want to go all out to cultivate an ordinary bone transformation realm, they can do it, but without that need, it is impossible to do it.

Who wants to waste resources to cultivate an ordinary bone transformation realm, and it has nothing to do with themselves, they are just members of the Chaos Cave, and they don't have this treatment.

Not only the Chaos Cave, but other top overlord-level forces also paid attention to Xishan, and they all envied Xishan for the birth of another bone transformation realm.

In this way, Xishan has five bone transformation realms, and his strength has skyrocketed.

Not long after, they were even more shocked to learn that Xishan was born from an ancient-level genius-level bone transformation realm.

An ordinary Bone Transformation Realm and an Ancient-level genius-level Bone Transformation Realm, this is a big difference!

The primordial-level genius of the Bone Transformation Realm can directly compare to the combat power of the three Bone Transformation Realms!

......

Xishan.

Ye Tian, the blood fish Heavenly Ancestor vest, gradually stabilized the realm.

Then, he was out of the customs.

At this time, the four bone transformation realms of Xishan all came over.

"Lord of Bloodfish, congratulations on the breakthrough!"

"Lord of Bloodfish, congratulations on the breakthrough!"

"Lord of Bloodfish, congratulations on the breakthrough!"

The four bone transformers congratulated one after another.

Ye Tian's vest broke through to become an ancient-level genius, and naturally he naturally became one of the five giants of Xishan, and his status instantly increased I don't know how many times.

The key is that he is still an ancient-level genius, and his combat power is comparable to the three bone transformation realms, among the five bone transformation realms in Xishan, he is not the weakest, but he is ranked second, and it is estimated that only the master of the giant bones is stronger than him.

The Lord of the Giant Bones is a boundary-breaking genius of the Three Bone Transformation Realms, and is therefore the most powerful.

The other three Bone Transformation Realms were slightly weaker, among which the Lord of Haize was the weakest, only the second Bone Transformation Realm, and he was not a boundary-breaking genius, let alone an ancient genius.

At this time, the Lord of the Giant Bones asked, "Lord of the Blood Fish, how did you manage to break through the Bone Transformation Realm in such a short period of time?"

Ye Tian naturally found a reason a long time ago, so he said: "I just have a good understanding of the Ancient Golden Script and the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique. I have created a lot of top-notch Ancient Bone Techniques that are infinitely close to the most advanced Ancient Bone Techniques, and with some resources, I am also very lucky, and I have successfully transformed the last few immeasurable bones. "

"That's what happened!"

The four bone transformations were shocked.

But it seems that this possibility is also the most reasonable, and it is not reasonable for other reasons.

After all, if there are no resources, there is only the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique and the top Ancient Bone Technique with the resources to break through.

After learning the truth, they didn't ask much.

After all, this method is only suitable for Ye Tian, not for other Blood Transformation Realm creatures, there is no way to copy this method.

Immediately, they secretly regretted it.

I thought Ye Tian had a special way to break through, but I still thought too much!

Soon after, Xishan announced the title of the Lord of the Bloodfish.

And the other top overlord-level forces all knew that Xishan had an additional Bone Transformation Realm primordial-level genius, which made Xishan's status even higher.

Of course, the ratio between Xishan and the Mixed Ruins Cave is much worse, and there is no comparison at all.

Time passed slowly, and the barriers in this part of the Hunhe River Boundary Rift gradually dissipated, which means that the Hunhe River Boundary Crack will be completely integrated into the territorial sea boundary Seam.

At this time, the top overlord-level forces such as the Chaos Ruins Cave, Xishan, and True Dragon Cave Heaven were all ready to move, wanting to go out and occupy more territory.

Rumble!!!!

The barrier of the Hunhe River boundary rift has completely disappeared, and this part of the territory has completely become a part of the territorial sea boundary rift.

Whew!!

A bone transformation existence has entered the territorial sea boundary rift, and their strength has not been suppressed, they have completely become a part of the territorial sea boundary rift.

"Let's go, go and destroy a few top hegemon-level forces in the seam of the territorial waters!"

The Lord of the Ruins said lightly.

He wants to be powerful!

"Which is the closest top overlord-level force here recently?"

The Lord of the Ruins asked.

"It's the Taigu Peng Clan!" said a bone transformation realm.

"Then destroy the Taigu Peng clan first!"

The Lord of the Ruins said lightly.

This is, the Lord of the Golden Feather of the Feather Alliance's Bone Transformation Realm creature stood up and said: "Lord of the Ruins, the Taigu Peng Clan is willing to take refuge in our Feather Alliance, and please let the Lord of the Ruins let the Taigu Peng Clan go." "

"The Taigu Peng clan has joined your Feather Alliance, so forget it!"

The main path of the ruins.

If it was before, he really wouldn't have taken the Feather Alliance seriously, but right now, there are not many top overlord-level forces in the Hunhe Realm, and they still need to join forces, so they can't fight against all the forces on their own.

Therefore, he will not deliberately offend the Feather League.

"Lord of the Ruins, the Ancient Dragon Clan has also taken refuge in us, don't embarrass them!"

The Ancient Chaos Dragon appeared and said.

"You guys!"

The Lord of the Ruins frowned.

In case the entire territorial sea boundary crack has taken refuge in this group of guys, he can't stand up for it?

"Let's go find trouble in the Dark Sea!"

The Lord of the Ruins decided.

Rumble!!!!!

A group of bone transformation realms flew towards the Dark Sea.

However.

At this time, the dark sea has long been emptied, and this is also the decision of the dark lord, who decided to avoid the edge for the time being.

Dark Sea.

The Lord of the Ruins has descended.

"The Dark Sea has run!"

The Lord of the Ruins said coldly.

He probably guessed that the group of guys ran into the territorial waters, but thought that they could be saved by entering the territorial waters.

He wants to stand up, but no one can stop him.

"Give me a direct invasion of the Taikoo Sea!!

He remembered that the strength of the primeval sea was not weak, and it was also one of the main fighting forces on the side of the cultivators of the primeval era.

So, the Lord of the Ruins went directly to the Ancient Sea.

In a short time, they came to the Taikoo Sea.

Taigu Mountain, the Ice and Snow Palace, and another top overlord-level force, the Qingyou Sect, all knew at this time that a group of bone transformation realms had come from the outside world, and their expressions changed drastically.

The three of their top overlord-level forces can only put together a total of seven bone transformation realms, how can they resist the invasion of the Lord of the Ruins!

Therefore, we can only ask for help!

But in the case of a relatively weak seam in the territorial waters, it is difficult to say whether other forces will help.

"We still have an advantage, the Ancient Sea is a territorial waters, and it has a suppressive effect on the creatures of the Blood Transformation Realm in the outside world. The Lord of Taikoo Mountain thought to himself.

But he also knows that this suppression is of little significance and will not solve the problem.

Bang!!!!

The Lord of the Ruins attacked from the outside of the Ancient Sea, and one attack after another tore through the walls of the Ancient Sea.

Finally, the Taikoo Sea was breached.

"Hahaha, there's no point in you hiding inside the territorial waters!"

The Lord of the Ruins said with a smile.

At this moment, a figure appeared and stopped the Lord of the Ruins.

"Lord of the Ruins, let's live in peace, don't invade at every turn!"

It was the Lord of the Void who stopped the Lord of the Ruins.
